code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut in_word = false
  mut has_word = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        in_word = false
      else
        if not in_word
          if has_word
            result = "#{result} "
          end
          in_word = true
          has_word = true
          mut c = b
          if c >= 97 and c <= 122
            c = c - 32
          end
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
        else
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
